work_unit: 合并 3 个 pending PROGRESS.md worktree + 修复 opt-worktree.sh merge 泄漏 .opt-direction bug
situation: scout-scan 前 3 推荐均为 '等合并 PROGRESS.md worktree'（browser-use score=6.68, shizi=6.2, skills=6.08）。worktree 已有 PROGRESS.md 提交但未合并到 main。同时发现 cmd_merge() 在 squash 合并时未排除 .opt-direction 元数据文件，导致泄漏到 main。
action: 1) 用 opt-worktree.sh merge 合并 browser-use/opt-browser-use-1782636860、shizi/opt-docs-1782636645、skills/opt-docs-1782637363 三个 worktree 到各自 main/master；2) 发现并修复 opt-worktree.sh cmd_merge() 中缺少 `git rm .opt-direction` 的 bug；3) 清理已被泄漏的 .opt-direction 文件（3 个项目各一个 follow-up commit）；4) reject 空的 skills/opt-skills-1782637143 worktree
outcome_evidence: browser-use git log shows merge commit 3cbe452 + cleanup commit; shizi git log shows merge commit 3768aa4 + cleanup; skills git log shows merge commit; opt-worktree.sh now has `git rm -f --cached .opt-direction` before commit in cmd_merge(); all 3 projects have PROGRESS.md on main and no .opt-direction
next_suggestion: 再跑 scout-scan 验证 score 下降；合并其余项目的待合并 PROGRESS.md worktree（agent-dashboard, 1BfrYn9G, agentfw, dingtalk-auto, kaoqin, linshi 等）；x-tool PROGRESS.md stale 8.4 天需刷新
